Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify adding a beneficiary with valid account number and IFSC
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary screen
Steps:
Step 1: Enter a valid 12‑digit account number in the Account Number field
Step 2: Enter a valid IFSC code (e.g., ABCD0123456) in the IFSC field
Step 3: Enter beneficiary name in the Name field
Step 4: Tap the 'Add Beneficiary' button
Expected_Result: System shows a success message 'Beneficiary added successfully' and the new beneficiary appears in the beneficiary list

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify transferring money to a registered beneficiary within limits
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary has been added, and on the Transfer screen
Steps:
Step 1: Select the previously added beneficiary from the list
Step 2: Enter a transfer amount of ₹5,000
Step 3: Tap 'Proceed' to trigger OTP generation
Step 4: Enter the received OTP and confirm
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed, a confirmation message 'Transfer successful' is displayed, and the transaction appears in the history instantly

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify OTP verification succeeds and transaction completes
Precondition: User is on the OTP entry screen after initiating a transfer
Steps:
Step 1: Enter a correct OTP received on the registered mobile number
Step 2: Tap the 'Verify OTP' button
Expected_Result: OTP is validated, transaction is processed, and a success message is shown

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify system rejects beneficiary with invalid account number format
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary screen
Steps:
Step 1: Enter an invalid account number containing letters (e.g., 12AB34CD56)
Step 2: Enter a valid IFSC code
Step 3: Tap the 'Add Beneficiary' button
Expected_Result: System displays an error message 'Invalid account number format' and does not add the beneficiary

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify transfer fails when amount exceeds the maximum limit
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on the Transfer screen
Steps:
Step 1: Select the beneficiary
Step 2: Enter a transfer amount of ₹150,000 (above ₹1,00,000 limit)
Step 3: Tap 'Proceed'
Expected_Result: System shows an error 'Transfer amount exceeds allowed limit' and prevents proceeding to OTP

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify beneficiary can be added with account number at minimum and maximum length
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Add Beneficiary screen
Steps:
Step 1: Enter a 10‑digit account number (minimum length) and valid IFSC
Step 2: Tap 'Add Beneficiary' and verify success
Step 3: Delete the beneficiary
Step 4: Enter a 16‑digit account number (maximum length) and valid IFSC
Step 5: Tap 'Add Beneficiary' and verify success
Expected_Result: Both additions succeed and the beneficiaries appear in the list

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify OTP lockout after three consecutive failed attempts prevents transfer
Precondition: User has initiated a transfer and is on the OTP entry screen
Steps:
Step 1: Enter an incorrect OTP and tap 'Verify OTP'
Step 2: Repeat step 1 two more times with wrong OTPs
Step 3: Observe the system response after the third failure
Expected_Result: System locks the transaction, displays 'Maximum OTP attempts exceeded. Transaction cancelled.' and does not allow further attempts

Feature: Add Beneficiary and Instant Fund Transfer
Title: Verify Add Beneficiary API returns success for a valid payload
Precondition: API endpoint /api/beneficiaries is reachable and user token is valid
Steps:
Step 1: Send a POST request with JSON body containing accountNumber, ifscCode, and name
Step 2: Include Authorization header with Bearer token
Step 3: Observe the HTTP response
Expected_Result: Response status 201 Created with body { "status": "success", "message": "Beneficiary added" }

Title: Verify adding a beneficiary with valid account number and IFSC
Precondition: User is logged in and on Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary screen
Step 2: Enter a valid account number (123456789012)
Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code (ABCD0123456)
Step 4: Click the 'Add Beneficiary' button
Step 5: Observe the success notification
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added successfully and a success message is displayed

Title: Verify transferring money within allowed limits with correct OTP

Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 5000
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' to trigger OTP
Step 4: Enter the correct OTP received (123456)
Step 5: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 6: Verify confirmation message is shown
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed successfully and confirmation message is displayed

Title: Verify success message is displayed after a completed transfer
Precondition: User has just completed a successful transfer

Step 2: Locate the notification area
Step 3: Read the displayed message
Expected_Result: Message 'Transfer successful' (or equivalent) is shown to the user

Title: Verify error when adding beneficiary with invalid account number format

Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code (ABCD0123456)
Step 4: Click the 'Add Beneficiary' button

Title: Verify transaction history API returns the recent transfer record
Precondition: A successful transfer has been made earlier in the session
Steps:
Step 1: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=USER123
Step 2: Receive JSON response
Step 3: Validate that the latest entry matches the recent transfer details (amount, beneficiary, status)
Expected_Result: API returns a list containing the newly created transaction with correct details and status 'Success'

Step 3: Click the "Add Beneficiary" button
Step 4: Observe the system behavior
Expected_Result: System redirects to login page or shows "Session expired" message; beneficiary is not added
